nodes.name: 0mgmxTmGAqAKCQpg
nodes.comment:
endpoint = POST /accounts/{accountId}/statements
responseSuccess = 202 Accepted
responseError = 400|401|403|404|409|422

nodes.name: AuthenticateRequest
ValidateStatementRequest
nodes.comment:
desc = Validate statement request parameters and check idempotency. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","source":"request"}, 
{"name":"statementRequest","type":"StatementRequest","source":"request"}, 
{"name":"idempotencyKey","type":"String","source":"request"}, 
{"name":"customerId","type":"UUID","source":"context"} 
] 
outputs = [ 
{"name":"validatedStatement","type":"ValidatedStatement","target":"context"}, 
{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID?","target":"context"}, 
{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","target":"context"} 
] 
exceptions = ["BadRequest","Conflict","NotFound"] 
preCondition = customer_authenticated 
postCondition = request_validated_and_idempotency_checked 
sideEffects = true

nodes.name: EvaluateStatementStatus
nodes.comment:
desc = Evaluate current statement status to determine processing path. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"validatedStatement","type":"ValidatedStatement","source":"context"} 
] 
outputs = [{"name":"statementStatus","type":"StatementStatus","target":"context"}] 
exceptions = ["Conflict"]

nodes.name: BuildCompletedResponse
nodes.comment:
desc = Build 202 response for existing completed statement. 
inputs = [{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [{"name":"response","type":"StatementAcceptedResponse","target":"response"}]

nodes.name: CheckJobProgress
nodes.comment:
desc = Check if running job is stalled or needs to be restarted. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID","source":"context"} 
] 
outputs = [{"name":"jobProgress","type":"JobProgress","target":"context"}] 
exceptions = ["JobNotFound"] 
preCondition = statement_status_running 
postCondition = job_progress_evaluated

nodes.name: RestartJob
nodes.comment:
desc = Restart stalled job with monitoring. 
inputs = [{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [ 
{"name":"restartedJobId","type":"UUID","target":"context"} 
] 
preCondition = job_stalled 
postCondition = job_restarted_and_monitored 
sideEffects = true

nodes.name: BuildRestartedJobResponse
nodes.comment:
desc = Build 202 response for restarted job. 
inputs = [{"name":"restartedJobId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [{"name":"response","type":"StatementAcceptedResponse","target":"response"}]

nodes.name: BuildRunningResponse
nodes.comment:
desc = Build 202 response for still-running job. 
inputs = [{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [{"name":"response","type": 
"StatementAcceptedResponse","target":"response"}]

nodes.name: AnalyzeFailureReason
nodes.comment:
desc = Analyze why previous statement generation failed. 
inputs = [{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [{"name":"failureAnalysis","type":"FailureAnalysis","target":"context"}] 
exceptions = ["AnalysisUnavailable"] 
preCondition = statement_status_failed 
postCondition = failure_root_cause_identified

nodes.name: RecoverFailedJob
nodes.comment:
desc = Recover failed job with checkpoint resume. 
inputs = [{"name":"existingStatementId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [ 
{"name":"recoveryResult","type":"RecoveryResult","target":"context"}, 
{"name":"resumePoint","type":"ResumePoint","target":"context"} 
] 
preCondition = retryable_failure_detected 
postCondition = job_recovery_initiated 
sideEffects = true

nodes.name: CreateNewStatementJob
nodes.comment:
desc = Create new job for non-retryable failures. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"validatedStatement","type":"ValidatedStatement","source":"context"}
] 
outputs = [{"name":"newStatementId","type":"UUID","target":"context"}] 
sideEffects = true

nodes.name: CreateStatementJob
nodes.comment:
desc = Create statement generation job. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"validatedStatement","type":"ValidatedStatement","source":"context"} 
] 
outputs = [{"name":"statementId","type":"UUID","target":"context"}] 
sideEffects = true

nodes.name: LoadTransactions
nodes.comment:
desc = Load transactions for the account and period. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"validatedStatement","type":"ValidatedStatement","source":"context"}
] 
outputs = [{"name":"transactions","type":"Transaction[]","target":"context"}] 
exceptions = ["NotFound","DataCorruption"] 
preCondition = job_created 
postCondition = transaction_data_loaded

nodes.name: LoadFeesAndRates
nodes.comment:
desc = Load fee schedule and FX rates from cache. 
inputs = [{"name":"validatedStatement","type":"ValidatedStatement","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [ {"name":"feeSchedule","type":"FeeSchedule","target":"context"}, 
{"name":"preliminaryCalculations","type":"CalculationResult[]","target":"context"} ]

nodes.name: FetchAccountProfile
nodes.comment:
desc = Fetch account holder profile and formatting preferences. 
inputs = [{"name":"accountId","type":"UUID","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [ {"name":"accountProfile","type":"AccountProfile","target":"context"} ] 
retryPolicy = {"maxAttempts":2,"backoffMs":400,"retryOn":["Timeout","502","503"], "onRetryExhausted": "throw_ProfileServiceUnavailable"} 
exceptions = ["ProfileServiceUnavailable"] 
preCondition = job_created 
postCondition = account_profile_retrieved 
sideEffects = false

nodes.name: ComputeStatementTotals
nodes.comment:
desc = Compute totals using preliminary calculations and transaction data. 
inputs = [ {"name":"transactions","type":"Transaction[]","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"feeSchedule","type":"FeeSchedule","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"preliminaryCalculations","type":"CalculationResult[]","source":"context"}] 
outputs = [{"name":"statementTotals","type":"StatementTotals","target":"context"}]

nodes.name: RenderStatementDocument
nodes.comment:
desc = Render document with formatting preferences and computed totals. 
inputs = [ 
{"name":"accountProfile","type":"AccountProfile","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"formattingPreferences","type":"FormattingPreferences","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"transactions","type":"Transaction[]","source":"context"}, 
{"name":"statementTotals","type":"StatementTotals","source":"context"} 
] 
outputs = [{"name":"statementDocument","type":"byte[]","target":"context"}]

nodes.name: StoreStatement
PublishStatementReady
BuildRecoveryResponse
nodes.comment:
desc = Build 202 response for recovered job 
inputs = [{"name": "recoveryResult", "type": "RecoveryResult", "source": "context"}] 
outputs = [{"name": "response", "type": "StatementAcceptedResponse","target": "response"}]

nodes.name: BuildNewResponse
nodes.comment:
desc = Build 202 response for newly created job 
inputs = [{"name": "newStatementId", "type": "UUID","source": "context"}] 
outputs = [{"name": "response", "type": "StatementAcceptedResponse","target": "response"}]

nodes.name: LoadFormattingPreferences
nodes.comment:
desc = Extract formatting preferences from # account profile 
inputs = [{"name": "accountProfile", "type": "AccountProfile","source": "context"}]
outputs = [{"name": "formattingPreferences","type": "FormattingPreferences", "target": "context"}]

nodes.name: UseDefaultFormattingPreferences
nodes.comment:
desc = Use system default formatting preferences # when profile is unavailable 
outputs = [{"name": "formattingPreferences","type": "FormattingPreferences", "target": "context"}]

nodes.name: BuildStatementResponse
nodes.comment:
desc = Build 202 response with download URL 
inputs = [{"name": "statementId", "type": "UUID", "source": "context"},{"name": "downloadUrl", "type": "String", "source": "context"}] 
outputs = [{"name": "response", "type": "StatementAcceptedResponse","target": "response"}]
